ddls:
CREATE TABLE "thermal_system" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thermal system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the thermal system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the thermal system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the system was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the system was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the thermal system the threshold belongs to */,
  "threshold_name" TEXT /* Name of the threshold (e.g., threshold1, threshold2) */,
  "threshold_value" TEXT /* Value of the threshold */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of threshold (e.g., temperature, trip) */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of alert (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the threshold was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the threshold was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES thermal_system ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_levels" (
  "trip_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip level */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the thermal system the trip level belongs to */,
  "trip_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the trip level (e.g., trip_level1) */,
  "trip_level_value" TEXT /* Value of the trip level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trip level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trip level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_levels_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES thermal_system ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the threshold the status belongs to */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., threshold1_reached) */,
  "status_value" TEXT /* Value of the status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_threshold_id FOREIGN KEY ("threshold_id") REFERENCES thresholds ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform (e.g., integrated FPGA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the platform was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the platform was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sysfs_files" (
  "sysfs_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sysfs file */,
  "sysfs_file_name" TEXT /* Name of the sysfs file (e.g., threshold1) */,
  "mmio_field" TEXT /* MMIO field of the sysfs file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sysfs file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sysfs file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sysfs_file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the thermal system the access control belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the access control belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access control was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access control was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES thermal_system ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, engineer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the thermal system the log belongs to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., temperature threshold reached) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time the event occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES thermal_system ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the thermal system the analytics belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., temperature) */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time the metric was measured */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES thermal_system ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the thermal system the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., temperature threshold reached) */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time the notification was sent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES thermal_system ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platform_support" (
  "platform_support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform support entry */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the thermal system the platform support belongs to */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the platform the support belongs to */,
  "support_level" TEXT /* Level of support (e.g., integrated, external) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the platform support was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the platform support was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_platform_support_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES thermal_system ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_platform_support_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature reading */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the thermal system the reading belongs to */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Value of the temperature reading */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time the temperature was measured */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reading was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reading was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_readings_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES thermal_system ("system_id")
)
